{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_01XcFJ5vBJq9FEcrhhwem9Ps","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_015mTHRaysYHCin3snBra8dy","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 << 'EOF'\nimport pandas as pd, numpy as np\ndf = pd.read_pickle('sales.pkl')\nprint('demand value counts:', df.Reported_Demand.value_counts().sort_index().to_dict())\n\n# store-product daily totals\nag = df.groupby(['Store_ID','Product_ID','Day']).Reported_Demand.sum().unstack(fill_value=0)\nag = ag.reindex(columns=range(1,366), fill_value=0)\nprint(ag.shape)\n\n# find big dips: ratio to rolling median (centered, window 29)\narr = ag.values.astype(float)\nmed = pd.DataFrame(arr).T.rolling(29, center=True, min_periods=10).median().T.values\nratio = arr/np.maximum(med,1)\n# count store-products with any day ratio < 0.6\nhits = (ratio < 0.6)\nprint('store-products with dips<0.6:', hits.any(axis=1).sum(), 'of 300')\nidx = np.argwhere(hits)\n# show a couple of examples with context\nshown = set()\nfor r, d in idx[:200]:\n    if r in shown or d<5 or d>350: continue\n    shown.add(r)\n    name = ag.index[r]\n    print(name, 'day', d+1, 'series d-3..d+18:', arr[r, d-3:d+18].astype(int), 'med~', int(med[r,d]))\n    if len(shown)>=6: break\nEOF","description":"Scan for dip signatures in store-product aggregate demand"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2787,"cache_read_input_tokens":40716,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2787,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":33,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"756e58f0-a7eb-473c-b5c0-696f75b2301b","request_id":"req_011CbwN5zndkCdtrFsEuB5Zx"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_01KkSFGNvq77ucLaUtUrRJ2s","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01U8yfDdwozWJUD45gtTCRy8","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 << 'EOF'\nimport os, re, json, pickle\nfrom collections import defaultdict\n\n# ---------- parse store orders ----------\norders = {}  # (day, store) -> {product: qty}\nod = '/app/raw_orders'\nfor fn in os.listdir(od):\n    m = re.match(r'day_(\\d+)_(S_\\d+)_(.+)\\.(json|txt|csv)$', fn)\n    day, store, fmt = int(m.group(1)), m.group(2), m.group(3)\n    path = os.path.join(od, fn)\n    d = {}\n    txt = open(path).read()\n    if fmt == 'api-json':\n        j = json.loads(txt)\n        assert j['store_id'] == store and j['date'] == f'Day_{day}', fn\n        for it in j['items']: d[it['prod_id']] = it['qty']\n    elif fmt == 'text-template':\n        for line in txt.strip().splitlines():\n            mm = re.match(r'Order from Day_(\\d+)\\. Please deliver (\\d+) units of product (P_\\d+)\\. Regards, Store (S_\\d+)\\.', line)\n            assert mm and int(mm.group(1))==day and mm.group(4)==store, (fn, line)\n            d[mm.group(3)] = int(mm.group(2))\n    elif fmt == 'key-value':\n        for line in txt.strip().splitlines():\n            mm = re.match(r'RECEIVER: (S_\\d+) \\| ORDER_PRODUCT: (P_\\d+) \\| ORDER_QTY: (\\d+)', line)\n            assert mm and mm.group(1)==store, (fn, line)\n            d[mm.group(2)] = int(mm.group(3))\n    elif fmt == 'table-csv':\n        lines = txt.strip().splitlines()\n        assert lines[0] == 'PRODUCT;QUANTITY', fn\n        for line in lines[1:]:\n            p, q = line.split(';'); d[p] = int(q)\n    orders[(day, store)] = d\nprint('orders parsed:', len(orders))\n\n# ---------- parse supplier receipts (line items) ----------\nsup = {}  # (day, producer) -> {product: qty}\nsd = '/app/raw_supplier_receipts'\nfor fn in os.listdir(sd):\n    m = re.match(r'day_(\\d+)_(PR_\\d+)_(.+)\\.(json|txt|csv)$', fn)\n    day, pr, fmt = int(m.group(1)), m.group(2), m.group(3)\n    txt = open(os.path.join(sd, fn)).read()\n    d = {}\n    if fmt == 'api-json':\n        j = json.loads(txt)\n        assert j['supplier_id']==pr and j['date']==f'Day_{day}', fn\n        for it in j['items']: d[it['prod_id']] = it['delivered_qty']\n    elif fmt == 'text-template':\n        for line in txt.strip().splitlines():\n            mm = re.match(r'Supplier (PR_\\d+) delivered (\\d+) units of product (P_\\d+) to the wholesaler on Day_(\\d+)\\.', line)\n            assert mm and mm.group(1)==pr and int(mm.group(4))==day, (fn, line)\n            d[mm.group(3)] = int(mm.group(2))\n    elif fmt == 'key-value':\n        lines = txt.strip().splitlines()\n        mm = re.match(r'SUPPLIER: (PR_\\d+) \\| DAY: (\\d+)', lines[0])\n        assert mm and mm.group(1)==pr and int(mm.group(2))==day, fn\n        for line in lines[1:]:\n            mm = re.match(r'PRODUCT: (P_\\d+) \\| DELIVERED_QTY: (\\d+)', line)\n            d[mm.group(1)] = int(mm.group(2))\n    elif fmt == 'table-csv':\n        lines = txt.strip().splitlines()\n        assert lines[0] == 'PRODUCT;DELIVERED_QTY', fn\n        for line in lines[1:]:\n            p, q = line.split(';'); d[p] = int(q)\n    sup[(day, pr)] = d\nprint('supplier receipts parsed:', len(sup))\n\n# ---------- wholesaler producer-acceptance sequences ----------\nwseq = {}  # (day, seq) -> producer\nfor fn in os.listdir('/app/raw_wholesaler_receipts'):\n    txt = open(os.path.join('/app/raw_wholesaler_receipts', fn)).read()\n    g = dict(re.findall(r'(\\w+): (\\S+)', txt))\n    day, pr, seq = int(g['DAY']), g['SUPPLIER_ID'], int(g['DAILY_SEQUENCE_NO'])\n    assert (day, seq) not in wseq\n    wseq[(day, seq)] = pr\nprint('wholesaler receipts parsed:', len(wseq))\n\n# ---------- store sequences + totals ----------\nsseq = {}  # (day, seq) -> (store, total)\nfor fn in os.listdir('/app/raw_wholesaler_store_receipts'):\n    txt = open(os.path.join('/app/raw_wholesaler_store_receipts', fn)).read()\n    g = dict(re.findall(r'(\\w+): (\\S+)', txt))\n    day, st, seq, tot = int(g['DAY']), g['STORE_ID'], int(g['DAILY_SEQUENCE_NO']), int(g['TOTAL_DELIVERED_UNITS'])\n    assert (day, seq) not in sseq\n    sseq[(day, seq)] = (st, tot)\nprint('store receipts parsed:', len(sseq))\n\n# sanity: per-day sequence ranges\ndays = sorted({d for d,_ in wseq})\nprint('producer seq range day1:', min(s for (d,s) in wseq if d==1), max(s for (d,s) in wseq if d==1))\nprint('store seq range day1:', min(s for (d,s) in sseq if d==1), max(s for (d,s) in sseq if d==1))\n\n# which store-days have no order file?\nmissing = [(d,s) for d in range(1,366) for s in [f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)] if (d,s) not in orders]\nprint('missing order files:', len(missing), missing[:10])\n# their delivered totals:\ntot_by_ds = {(d, st): tot for (d, sq),(st,tot) in sseq.items()}\nprint('delivered totals on missing-order days:', [tot_by_ds[m] for m in missing[:10]])\n\nwith open('parsed.pkl','wb') as f:\n    pickle.dump({'orders':orders,'sup':sup,'wseq':wseq,'sseq':sseq}, f)\nprint('saved parsed.pkl')\nEOF","description":"Parse all raw files into structured tables","timeout":300000},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":90,"cache_read_input_tokens":57152,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":90,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":63,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"1f85ae68-3c50-4831-949b-e1c169fea389","request_id":"req_011CbwNJfnkADoZ2cgStms8C"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_01Gb6ah3v1bBcvJ3yYSsPXK4","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_015HukmnQM8DKRYu8ZuMDt1T","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 << 'EOF'\nimport pickle\nfrom collections import deque, defaultdict\n\nP = pickle.load(open('parsed.pkl','rb'))\norders, sup, wseq, sseq = P['orders'], P['sup'], P['wseq'], P['sseq']\nproducts = [f'P_{i}' for i in range(1,31)]\n\n# wholesaler FIFO per product: deque of [batch_id, qty]; batch registry\nbatches = []  # batch_id -> (producer, day, product, qty)\nwh = {p: deque() for p in products}\n# deliveries[(day, store)][product] = list of (batch_id, qty) in FIFO order\ndeliveries = defaultdict(lambda: defaultdict(list))\n\nmismatch = 0\nfor day in range(1, 366):\n    # producers arrive in sequence order\n    for seq in range(1, 61):\n        pr = wseq[(day, seq)]\n        for p, q in sup[(day, pr)].items():\n            bid = len(batches)\n            batches.append((pr, day, p, q))\n            wh[p].append([bid, q])\n    # stores fulfilled in sequence order\n    for seq in range(1, 11):\n        st, tot = sseq[(day, seq)]\n        od = orders.get((day, st), {})\n        given = 0\n        for p, q in od.items():\n            need = q\n            while need > 0 and wh[p]:\n                b = wh[p][0]\n                take = min(need, b[1])\n                b[1] -= take; need -= take; given += take\n                deliveries[(day, st)][p].append((b[0], take))\n                if b[1] == 0: wh[p].popleft()\n        if given != tot:\n            mismatch += 1\n            if mismatch < 10: print('MISMATCH', day, st, 'sim', given, 'receipt', tot)\n\nprint('total store-day delivery mismatches:', mismatch)\nleftover = {p: sum(q for _,q in wh[p]) for p in products}\nprint('wholesaler leftover at end (sample):', dict(list(leftover.items())[:5]))\nprint('total batches:', len(batches))\n\nwith open('deliveries.pkl','wb') as f:\n    pickle.dump({'batches':batches, 'deliveries':dict(deliveries)}, f)\nEOF","description":"Simulate wholesaler FIFO allocation and validate against receipt totals","timeout":300000},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":735,"cache_read_input_tokens":59895,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":735,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":65,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"f028da68-7eaf-47ef-97ec-c67770c4bac9","request_id":"req_011CbwNMufWNc43Y5hjSJ7uH"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_01QHUrD65jZZXdnb36FhR3TP","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01RzSpq1KiWjXeH8zHY2cMtz","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 << 'EOF'\nimport pickle, pandas as pd, numpy as np\nfrom collections import deque, defaultdict\n\nD = pickle.load(open('deliveries.pkl','rb'))\nbatches, deliveries = D['batches'], D['deliveries']\ndf = pd.read_pickle('sales.pkl')\ndf = df.sort_index()  # original file order\nstores = [f'S_{i}' for i in range(1,11)]\nproducts = [f'P_{i}' for i in range(1,31)]\n\n# store FIFO queues: (store, product) -> deque of [batch_id, qty]\ninv = {(s,p): deque() for s in stores for p in products}\n\n# iterate rows grouped by day; within day, df order = store, consumer block, product order\nrows = df[['Day','Store_ID','Product_ID','Reported_Demand','Sold_Quantity','Lost_Sales']].to_records(index=True)\npurch_batches = {}  # df index -> list of (batch_id, qty_taken)\nbad = 0\ncur_day = 0\nfor idx, day, st, p, dem, sold, lost in rows:\n    if day != cur_day:\n        # end of previous day: append previous day's deliveries\n        if cur_day > 0:\n            for s2 in stores:\n                dd = deliveries.get((cur_day, s2))\n                if dd:\n                    for p2, segs in dd.items():\n                        q2 = inv[(s2,p2)]\n                        for bid, q in segs: q2.append([bid, q])\n        cur_day = day\n    q = inv[(st,p)]\n    avail = sum(x[1] for x in q)\n    exp_sold = min(dem, avail)\n    if exp_sold != sold or dem - sold != lost:\n        bad += 1\n        if bad <= 10: print('INCONSISTENT', day, st, p, 'dem', dem, 'sold', sold, 'expected', exp_sold, 'avail', avail)\n    take = sold\n    taken = []\n    while take > 0 and q:\n        b = q[0]\n        t = min(take, b[1])\n        b[1] -= t; take -= t\n        taken.append((b[0], t))\n        if b[1] == 0: q.popleft()\n    if taken: purch_batches[idx] = taken\n\nprint('inconsistent rows:', bad, 'of', len(rows))\nprint('rows with purchases:', len(purch_batches))\nwith open('purchases.pkl','wb') as f:\n    pickle.dump(purch_batches, f)\nEOF","description":"Simulate store FIFO consumption per consumer purchase and validate","timeout":600000},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":955,"cache_read_input_tokens":60630,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":955,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":27,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"c585ae74-558a-425f-9d9c-2ecdee5ae043","request_id":"req_011CbwNNwoGsgWxjnuc4wJA4"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_015HvD795ELdmoALK6ET4Zui","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01JZZxu2Ukf8rjuPHhYeCUfn","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 << 'EOF'\nimport numpy as np, pandas as pd\nA = np.load('panel.npy').astype(float)  # 15570 x 365\nkeys = pd.read_csv('panel_keys.csv')['0' if '0' in pd.read_csv('panel_keys.csv').columns else 'key']\nkeys = pd.read_csv('panel_keys.csv').iloc[:,0]\nprod = keys.str.split('|').str[2].values\nstore = keys.str.split('|').str[0].values\n\nshop = (A>0)\ns_frac = shop.mean()\nprint('global shop frac:', round(s_frac,4))\n# is shopping frac constant per series? distribution across series\nsf = shop.mean(axis=1)\nprint('per-series shop frac: mean', sf.mean().round(3), 'std', sf.std().round(3), 'min', sf.min().round(3), 'max', sf.max().round(3))\n\n# multiplicative fit of qty given shopping: q_cpd ~ b_c * g_pd\nQ = np.where(shop, A, np.nan)\nb = np.nanmean(Q, axis=1)\nG = {}\nfor p in np.unique(prod):\n    M = Q[prod==p] / b[prod==p][:,None]\n    g = np.nanmean(M, axis=0)\n    G[p] = g\n# refine b\ngmat = np.vstack([G[p] for p in prod])\nb = np.nanmean(Q/gmat, axis=1)\ngmat2 = {}\nfor p in np.unique(prod):\n    M = Q[prod==p] / b[prod==p][:,None]\n    gmat2[p] = np.nanmean(M, axis=0)\ngmat = np.vstack([gmat2[p] for p in prod])\nM_exp = b[:,None]*gmat  # expected qty given shopping\nprint('base b: mean', b.mean().round(2), 'range', b.min().round(2), b.max().round(2))\ng1 = gmat2['P_1']; \nprint('cal P_1 every 15d:', np.round(g1[::15],3))\nprint('cal P_17 every 15d:', np.round(gmat2['P_17'][::15],3))\n\n# validate categorical model P(k|m) vs linear rounding 1-|k-m|\nms = M_exp[shop]; ks = A[shop]\nbins = np.arange(1.0, 4.0, 0.1)\nib = np.digitize(ms, bins)\nprint('m-bin | n | P1 P2 P3 P4 | model P(floor) etc')\nfor i in range(3, 28, 2):\n    sel = ib==i\n    if sel.sum()<500: continue\n    mm = bins[i-1]+0.05\n    obs = [ (ks[sel]==k).mean() for k in (1,2,3,4)]\n    mod = [ max(0, 1-abs(k-mm)) for k in (1,2,3,4)]\n    print(f'{mm:.2f} | {sel.sum():7d} | ' + ' '.join(f'{o:.3f}' for o in obs) + ' | ' + ' '.join(f'{m:.3f}' for m in mod))\nnp.save('M_exp.npy', M_exp)\nnp.save('gmat.npy', gmat)\nnp.save('b.npy', b)\npd.Series(prod).to_csv('panel_prod.csv', index=False)\npd.Series(store).to_csv('panel_store.csv', index=False)\nEOF","description":"Fit base × calendar demand model and validate rounding distribution","timeout":300000},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":5952,"cache_read_input_tokens":63091,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":5952,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":64,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"1072c01d-9a57-4cee-8ec9-47656cf083be","request_id":"req_011CbwNZQpFQD9BNGv1g1tTE"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_01WYFv6h7qd3XakRNHo9gVyb","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01QxjsLPY3XGXD5LMUZgdHh4","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 << 'EOF'\nimport numpy as np, pandas as pd, pickle\n\nA = np.load('panel.npy').astype(int)        # demand panel (rows x 365)\nM = np.load('M_exp.npy')                    # expected qty given shopping\nkeys = pd.read_csv('panel_keys.csv').iloc[:,0].values\nN, T = A.shape\ns_row = (A>0).mean(axis=1)                  # per-series shopping rate\n\n# ---- null demand-value table by m-bin over k=1..6 (given purchase happened) ----\nedges = np.arange(1.4, 3.7, 0.1)\nib_all = np.digitize(M, edges)              # bin index per cell\nnb = len(edges)+1\nfreq = np.zeros((nb, 7))\nfor k in range(1,7):\n    np.add.at(freq[:,k], ib_all[(A==k)], 1)\nfreq[:,1:] += 1.0  # smoothing\nqk = freq[:,1:] / freq[:,1:].sum(axis=1, keepdims=True)  # P(qty=k|shopped,bin), k=1..6\nnp.save('qk_bins.npy', qk)\n\n# ---- recovery emission model: P(qty=k | shopped, m_eff) for m_eff in [0.2, 3.8] ----\ndef rec_qty_probs(meff):\n    # triangular-ish rounding with modest noise, calibrated to observed stage shapes\n    # width grows mildly with m\n    w = 0.55 + 0.1*meff\n    lo, hi = meff-w, meff+w\n    p = np.zeros(7)\n    for k in range(0,7):\n        a, bnd = max(lo, k-0.5), min(hi, k+0.5)\n        p[k] = max(0.0, bnd-a)/(hi-lo)\n    p = p/p.sum()\n    p = 0.96*p + 0.04*np.array([0.15,0.25,0.3,0.2,0.07,0.02,0.01])  # contamination floor\n    return p\n\nREC_GRID = np.arange(0.1, 4.01, 0.05)\nREC_TAB = np.vstack([rec_qty_probs(m) for m in REC_GRID])\n\nTAU = np.array([0.2]*3 + [0.5]*4 + [0.8]*7)\n\ndef llr_windows(rows, days):\n    \"\"\"LLR that recovery starts at day d+1 (1-indexed trigger day d) for arrays rows, days.\"\"\"\n    out = np.zeros(len(rows))\n    ndays = np.zeros(len(rows), dtype=int)\n    for j,(r,d) in enumerate(zip(rows, days)):\n        s = s_row[r]\n        tot = 0.0\n        for k in range(1,15):\n            t = d+k-1  # 0-indexed day of window position k\n            if t >= T: break\n            x = A[r,t]; m = M[r,t]; meff = m*TAU[k-1]\n            # null prob\n            if x == 0: p0 = 1-s\n            else:\n                bin0 = min(max(np.digitize(m, edges),0), nb-1)\n                p0 = s * qk[bin0, min(x,6)-1]\n            # recovery prob\n            pr_q = REC_TAB[np.clip(int(round((meff-0.1)/0.05)), 0, len(REC_GRID)-1)]\n            if x == 0: pr = (1-s) + s*pr_q[0]\n            else: pr = s * pr_q[min(x,6)]\n            tot += np.clip(np.log(max(pr,1e-9)) - np.log(max(p0,1e-9)), -3.5, 3.5)\n            ndays[j] += 1\n        out[j] = tot\n    return out, ndays\n\n# ---- buyer-batch last consumption purchases ----\ndf = pd.read_pickle('sales.pkl')\ndf['key'] = df.Store_ID + '|' + df.cons.astype(str) + '|' + df.Product_ID\nkey_to_row = {k:i for i,k in enumerate(keys)}\ndf['row'] = df.key.map(key_to_row)\npurch = pickle.load(open('purchases.pkl','rb'))\nD = pickle.load(open('deliveries.pkl','rb'))\nbatches = D['batches']\n\nrows_arr = df.row.values; days_arr = df.Day.values; sold_arr = df.Sold_Quantity.values\nidx_arr = df.index.values\n\n# buyer-batch: (r, bid) -> [last_day, single_batch_flag_at_last_day]\nbb = {}\nfor i in range(len(df)):\n    if sold_arr[i] == 0: continue\n    segs = purch.get(idx_arr[i])\n    if not segs: continue\n    r, d = rows_arr[i], days_arr[i]\n    single = len(segs) == 1\n    for bid, q in segs:\n        cur = bb.get((r,bid))\n        if cur is None or d > cur[0]:\n            bb[(r,bid)] = [d, single]\nprint('buyer-batch pairs:', len(bb))\nwith open('bb.pkl','wb') as f: pickle.dump(bb, f)\n\n# compute LLR for each buyer-batch pair (dedupe by (r,d))\npairs = list(bb.items())\nrd = sorted({(r, v[0]) for (r,b),v in pairs})\nrd_rows = np.array([x[0] for x in rd]); rd_days = np.array([x[1] for x in rd])\nprint('unique (row,day) trigger candidates:', len(rd))\nllr, nd = llr_windows(rd_rows, rd_days)\nllr_map = {(r,d): (l, n) for (r,d),l,n in zip(rd, llr, nd)}\nwith open('llr_map.pkl','wb') as f: pickle.dump(llr_map, f)\nprint('LLR dist: mean', llr.mean().round(2), 'p50', np.percentile(llr,50).round(2),\n      'p99', np.percentile(llr,99).round(2), 'p99.9', np.percentile(llr,99.9).round(2),\n      'p99.99', np.percentile(llr,99.99).round(2), 'max', llr.max().round(2))\nprint('count > 5:', (llr>5).sum(), '> 8:', (llr>8).sum(), '> 12:', (llr>12).sum())\nEOF","description":"Compute per-buyer recovery LLR for all buyer-batch trigger candidates","timeout":600000},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":6893,"cache_read_input_tokens":77141,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":6893,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":49,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"2c1f5b68-4ebf-4d9f-ac20-7e844b87f64e","request_id":"req_011CbwNoKg5TedctyvS1qso4"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_011opfne2Sihju1ko4f1XU6k","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_013QUVzH9anWhmvG9kyHWUNA","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 << 'EOF'\nimport numpy as np, pickle, collections\nbb = pickle.load(open('bb.pkl','rb'))\nllr_map = pickle.load(open('llr_map.pkl','rb'))\nD = pickle.load(open('deliveries.pkl','rb'))\nbatches = D['batches']\n\nagg = collections.defaultdict(lambda: [0.0, 0, 0])  # bid -> [sum_llr, n_buyers, n_pos]\nfor (r, bid), (d, single) in bb.items():\n    l, n = llr_map[(r, d)]\n    a = agg[bid]\n    a[0] += l; a[1] += 1; a[2] += (l > 0)\n\nbids = np.array(list(agg.keys()))\nsums = np.array([agg[b][0] for b in bids])\nns   = np.array([agg[b][1] for b in bids])\npos  = np.array([agg[b][2] for b in bids])\nprint('batches with buyers:', len(bids))\nprint('sum LLR percentiles:', np.percentile(sums, [50, 99, 99.9, 99.99]).round(1), 'max', sums.max().round(1))\n# normalized score: mean per buyer and positive fraction\nfrac = pos/ns\nscore = sums\norder = np.argsort(-score)\nprint('\\ntop 60 batches by pooled LLR:')\nprint(f\"{'batch':>7} {'producer':>8} {'day':>4} {'prod':>5} {'qty':>4} {'sumLLR':>8} {'n':>3} {'npos':>4} {'frac':>5}\")\nfor i in order[:60]:\n    b = bids[i]; pr, day, p, q = batches[b]\n    print(f\"{b:>7} {pr:>8} {day:>4} {p:>5} {q:>4} {sums[i]:>8.1f} {ns[i]:>3} {pos[i]:>4} {frac[i]:>5.2f}\")\nnp.save('batch_ids.npy', bids); np.save('batch_sums.npy', sums); np.save('batch_ns.npy', ns); np.save('batch_pos.npy', pos)\nEOF","description":"Pool recovery evidence per producer batch","timeout":300000},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":8697,"cache_read_input_tokens":84034,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":8697,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":79,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"6543e03b-332e-4761-8711-4096d7200c64","request_id":"req_011CbwPBm2Brmeck1Meoci7F"}

s2 = W[:,:,3:7]; s3 = W[:,:,7:14]\ncond = (s1.max(axis=2) <= 1) & (s2.max(axis=2) <= 1) & ((s2>=1).sum(axis=2) >= 2) \\\n     & (s3.max(axis=2) <= 2) & ((s3==2).sum(axis=2) >= 3) & (Mw.min(axis=2) >= 2.0) & (s1.sum(axis=2) <= 1)\nidx = np.argwhere(cond)\nprint('strict events m>=2.0:', len(idx))\n# drop overlapping duplicates (same series within 3 days)\nev = []\nlast = {}\nfor r, t in idx:\n    if r in last and t - last[r] < 10: \n        last[r] = t; {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_01BzdqnTAjBhiQwogJDe5QsJ","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01JTqzM7wLireBomadR2zAXc","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/work/score_lib.py","content":"import numpy as np\n\nA = np.load('panel.npy').astype(np.int16)\nM = np.load('M_exp.npy')\nN, T = A.shape\ns_row = (A > 0).mean(axis=1)\n\n# ---- null table: P(qty=k | shopped, m-bin), k=1..6 ----\nedges = np.arange(1.4, 3.7, 0.1)\nqk = np.load('qk_bins.npy')          # (nbins, 6)\nIB = np.digitize(M, edges)           # N x T\n\n# ---- recovery emission anchors: qty dist given shopping, k=0..6 ----\n_anchors = [\n (0.10, [0.97,0.03,0,0,0,0,0]),\n (0.40, [0.84,0.16,0,0,0,0,0]),\n (0.50, [0.78,0.22,0.00,0,0,0,0]),\n (0.70, [0.50,0.49,0.01,0,0,0,0]),\n (0.90, [0.18,0.79,0.03,0,0,0,0]),\n (1.10, [0.04,0.90,0.06,0,0,0,0]),\n (1.30, [0.01,0.70,0.29,0,0,0,0]),\n (1.50, [0.01,0.38,0.60,0.01,0,0,0]),\n (1.70, [0.005,0.19,0.77,0.035,0,0,0]),\n (1.90, [0.005,0.10,0.82,0.075,0,0,0]),\n (2.10, [0.004,0.05,0.72,0.22,0.006,0,0]),\n (2.30, [0.003,0.08,0.57,0.34,0.007,0,0]),\n (2.50, [0.002,0.04,0.47,0.49,0.002,0,0]),\n (2.90, [0.002,0.024,0.33,0.45,0.16,0.03,0.001]),\n (3.30, [0.002,0.015,0.21,0.39,0.27,0.10,0.013]),\n (3.60, [0.002,0.01,0.15,0.33,0.32,0.15,0.04]),\n]\n_am = np.array([a[0] for a in _anchors])\n_ap = np.array([a[1] for a in _anchors], dtype=float)\n_ap = _ap / _ap.sum(axis=1, keepdims=True)\nCONTAM = np.array([0.3,0.3,0.25,0.1,0.03,0.01,0.01])\n\ndef rec_table(ms):\n    \"\"\"interpolated recovery qty dist for array of effective means\"\"\"\n    ms = np.clip(ms, _am[0], _am[-1])\n    hi = np.searchsorted(_am, ms).clip(1, len(_am)-1)\n    lo = hi - 1\n    w = ((ms - _am[lo]) / (_am[hi] - _am[lo]))[..., None]\n    P = (1-w)*_ap[lo] + w*_ap[hi]\n    return 0.995*P + 0.005*CONTAM\n\nTAUS = (0.2, 0.5, 0.8)\nCLIP = 4.5\n\ndef delta_arrays(X):\n    \"\"\"per-cell clipped log-lik difference (recovery stage tau vs null) for panel X\"\"\"\n    out = {}\n    s = s_row[:, None]\n    shopped = X > 0\n    xk = np.clip(X, 0, 6)\n    # null log prob of x>=1 part: log qk[IB, x-1]\n    lq = np.log(np.take_along_axis(qk[IB], (np.maximum(xk,1)-1)[...,None], axis=2)[...,0])\n    for tau in TAUS:\n        meff = M * tau\n        R = rec_table(meff)                       # N x T x 7\n        r0 = R[..., 0]\n        rx = np.take_along_axis(R, xk[..., None], axis=2)[..., 0]\n        d_zero = np.log1p(r0 * s/(1-s))           # x==0 case\n        d_pos = np.log(np.maximum(rx, 1e-12)) - lq\n        out[tau] = np.clip(np.where(shopped, d_pos, d_zero), -CLIP, CLIP)\n    return out\n\ndef window_scores(deltas, rows, days):\n    \"\"\"LLR for recovery starting day d+1 (days 1-indexed). Stages: d+1..d+3 (.2), d+4..d+7 (.5), d+8..d+14 (.8)\"\"\"\n    C = {tau: np.concatenate([np.zeros((N,1)), np.cumsum(deltas[tau], axis=1)], axis=1) for tau in TAUS}\n    def seg(tau, a, b, r, d):\n        # window day offsets a..b (1-indexed from trigger), clipped to T\n        lo = np.minimum(d + a - 1, T); hi = np.minimum(d + b, T)\n        return C[tau][r, hi] - C[tau][r, lo]\n    r, d = rows, days\n    return seg(0.2,1,3,r,d) + seg(0.5,4,7,r,d) + seg(0.8,8,14,r,d)\n\ndef simulate_null(rng):\n    \"\"\"simulate panel under null model\"\"\"\n    u1 = rng.random((N, T)); u2 = rng.random((N, T))\n    shop = u1 < s_row[:, None]\n    cum = np.cumsum(qk, axis=1)\n    qty = 1 + (u2[..., None] > cum[IB]).sum(axis=2)\n    return np.where(shop, qty, 0).astype(np.int16)\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":5071,"cache_read_input_tokens":96308,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":5071,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":30,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"4fe9cb04-7fa8-4709-9435-346292820f9a","request_id":"req_011CbwPLbddtsM56FHHG6mHx"}

1\n    w = ((ms - _am[lo]) / (_am[hi] - _am[lo]))[..., None]\n    P = (1-w)*_ap[lo] + w*_ap[hi]\n    return 0.995*P + 0.005*CONTAM\n\nTAUS = (0.2, 0.5, 0.8)\nCLIP = 4.5\n\ndef delta_arrays(X):\n    \"\"\"per-cell clipped log-lik difference (recovery stage tau vs null) for panel X\"\"\"\n    out = {}\n    s = s_row[:, None]\n    shopped = X > 0\n    xk = np.clip(X, 0, 6)\n    # null log prob of x>=1 part: log qk[IB, x-1]\n    lq = np.log(np.take_along_axis(qk[IB], (np.maximum(xk,1)-1)[...,None], axis=2)[...,0])\n    for tau in TAUS:\n        meff = M * tau\n        R = rec_table(meff)                       # N x T x 7\n        r0 = R[..., 0]\n        rx = np.take_along_axis(R, xk[..., None], axis=2)[..., 0]\n        d_zero = np.log1p(r0 * s/(1-s))           # x==0 case\n        d_pos = np.log(np.maximum(rx, 1e-12)) - lq\n        out[tau] = np.clip(np.where(shopped, d_pos, d_zero), -CLIP, CLIP)\n    return out\n\ndef window_scores(deltas, rows, days):\n    \"\"\"LLR for recovery starting day d+1 (days 1-indexed). Stages: d+1..d+3 (.2), d+4..d+7 (.5), d+8..d+14 (.8)\"\"\"\n    C = {tau: np.concatenate([np.zeros((N,1)), np.cumsum(deltas[tau], axis=1)], axis=1) for tau in TAUS}\n    def seg(tau, a, b, r, d):\n        # window day offsets a..b (1-indexed from trigger), clipped to T\n        lo = np.minimum(d + a - 1, T); hi = np.minimum(d + b, T)\n        return C[tau][r, hi] - C[tau][r, lo]\n    r, d = rows, days\n    return seg(0.2,1,3,r,d) + seg(0.5,4,7,r,d) + seg(0.8,8,14,r,d)\n\ndef simulate_null(rng):\n    \"\"\"simulate panel under null model\"\"\"\n    u1 = rng.random((N, T)); u2 = rng.random((N, T))\n    shop = u1 < s_row[:, None]\n    cum = np.cumsum(qk, axis=1)\n    qty = 1 + (u2[..., None] > cum[IB]).sum(axis=2)\n    return np.where(shop, qty, 0).astype(np.int16)\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null,"userModified":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_019D3AirLDwDrLS43avm64BU","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Rjx2WfG4B7FW3CCt6fd6od","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 << 'EOF'\nimport numpy as np, pandas as pd, pickle, collections\nimport score_lib as S\n\nbb = pickle.load(open('bb.pkl','rb'))\nD = pickle.load(open('deliveries.pkl','rb'))\nbatches = D['batches']\nreal = np.load('real_llr.npy'); crows = np.load('cand_rows.npy'); cdays = np.load('cand_days.npy')\nllr_lookup = {(r,d): l for r,d,l in zip(crows, cdays, real)}\n\n# need sold qty at (row, day): rebuild quickly\ndf = pd.read_pickle('sales.pkl')\nkeys = pd.read_csv('panel_keys.csv').iloc[:,0].values\nkey_ix = {k:i for i,k in enumerate(keys)}\ndf['row'] = (df.Store_ID + '|' + df.cons.astype(str) + '|' + df.Product_ID).map(key_ix)\nsold_panel = np.zeros((len(keys), 366), dtype=np.int16)\nsold_panel[df.row.values, df.Day.values] = df.Sold_Quantity.values\n\n# qualification: single-producer purchase, sold>=2, day <= 351 (full window)\nagg = collections.defaultdict(lambda: [0.0, 0])\nfor (r, bid), (d, single) in bb.items():\n    if not single or d > 351: continue\n    if sold_panel[r, d] < 2: continue\n    pr, dy, p, q = batches[bid]\n    l = llr_lookup[(r, d)]\n    a = agg[(pr, p)]\n    a[0] += l; a[1] += 1\n\npairs = sorted(agg.keys())\nsums = np.array([agg[k][0] for k in pairs])\nns = np.array([agg[k][1] for k in pairs])\nmean_l = sums/ns\nprint('pairs:', len(pairs), 'n per pair: median', int(np.median(ns)), 'range', ns.min(), ns.max())\n\n# null: per-pair expected mean is the global mean of *innocent* pairs; robust z via median/MAD\ngmed = np.median(mean_l)\n# per-pair std: estimate sd of llr within pair? use global sd of llr over qualified items\nalll = np.concatenate([[llr_lookup[(r,v[0])]]*1 for (r,b),v in bb.items() if v[1] and v[0]<=351 and sold_panel[r,v[0]]>=2])\nsd = alll.std()\nz = (mean_l - gmed) / (sd/np.sqrt(ns))\norder = np.argsort(-z)\nprint(f\"{'producer':>8} {'product':>6} {'n':>5} {'meanLLR':>8} {'z':>7}\")\nfor i in order[:80]:\n    pr, p = pairs[i]\n    print(f\"{pr:>8} {p:>6} {ns[i]:>5} {mean_l[i]:>8.2f} {z[i]:>7.1f}\")\nnp.save('pair_z.npy', z)\nwith open('pair_list.pkl','wb') as f: pickle.dump((pairs, sums, ns), f)\nprint('\\nz distribution: p50', np.percentile(z,50).round(2), 'p90', np.percentile(z,90).round(2), 'p99', np.percentile(z,99).round(2), 'max', z.max().round(1))\nprint('count z>4:', (z>4).sum(), 'z>5:', (z>5).sum(), 'z>6:', (z>6).sum(), 'z>8:', (z>8).sum())\nEOF","description":"Aggregate buyer LLR evidence per producer-product pair","timeout":300000},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":6448,"cache_read_input_tokens":110035,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":6448,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"692a6dbf-6b32-43c0-a72d-5bc60b1a316d","request_id":"req_011CbwPd98AXJmpjzikK7NG6"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_017yeoUs7beGo3TRJ8bnDjWW","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_011icgxwsahiEy3znrkhCs25","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 << 'EOF'\nimport numpy as np\nA = np.load('panel.npy').astype(int)\nN, T = A.shape\nS = (A>0).astype(float)\n\n# autocorrelation of shopping indicator, pooled across series\ndef acf(X, lag):\n    x = X - X.mean(axis=1, keepdims=True)\n    num = (x[:,:-lag]*x[:,lag:]).sum()\n    den = (x*x).sum()\n    return num/den\nfor lag in range(1,8):\n    print('shop ACF lag', lag, round(acf(S, lag),4))\n\n# gap distribution between shopping days (pooled)\ngaps = []\nfor i in range(0, N, 7):\n    days = np.where(A[i]>0)[0]\n    gaps.extend(np.diff(days).tolist())\nimport collections\ng = collections.Counter(gaps)\ntot = sum(g.values())\nprint('gap dist:', {k: round(v/tot,3) for k,v in sorted(g.items()) if k<=8})\n\n# qty autocorrelation given shopping (does qty cluster?)\nQ = np.where(A>0, A, np.nan)\nqa = []\nx = Q - np.nanmean(Q, axis=1, keepdims=True)\nfor lag in [1,2,3]:\n    a = x[:,:-lag]*x[:,lag:]\n    qa.append(np.nansum(a)/np.nansum(x*x))\nprint('qty ACF lags 1-3 (given shop):', [round(v,4) for v in qa])\n\n# day-of-week effect?\ndow = np.arange(T) % 7\nfor d in range(7):\n    print('dow', d, 'shop frac', round(S[:,dow==d].mean(),4))\nEOF","description":"Check shopping process structure: ACF, gaps, day-of-week","timeout":120000},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7668,"cache_read_input_tokens":116483,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":7668,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":38,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"59015ac5-b801-4174-ab8c-e83c1faab69e","request_id":"req_011CbwPkcrE6xYQE3rdsARPV"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_01EhfbpDRRe92sUqM2rFfqy3","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"","signature":""}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3745,"cache_read_input_tokens":134397,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3745,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":82,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"8ab5efca-f858-494a-92ce-d756f9d7ec5e","request_id":"req_011CbwQ1NAMMaAwvt6Cvryiz"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_01EhfbpDRRe92sUqM2rFfqy3","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01EviBBk5TBEugWQEe8TdkyG","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/work/em_lib.py","content":"import numpy as np\nfrom scipy.stats import norm\n\nA = np.load('panel.npy').astype(np.int16)\nN, T = A.shape\nPRODS = np.array(open('panel_prod.csv').read().split()[1:])\nKMAX = 8  # demand categories 0..8+\n\ndef fit_model(clean_mask):\n    \"\"\"multiplicative fit of qty|shop on clean cells; returns s_row, b, g(N,T) M, sigma(m-bins)\"\"\"\n    shopped = (A > 0) & clean_mask\n    Q = np.where(shopped, A.astype(float), np.nan)\n    # per-series shopping rate on clean days\n    s_row = ((A > 0) & clean_mask).sum(axis=1) / np.maximum(clean_mask.sum(axis=1), 1)\n    b = np.nanmean(Q, axis=1)\n    g = np.ones((N, T))\n    for it in range(3):\n        R = Q / b[:, None]\n        gm = {}\n        for p in np.unique(PRODS):\n            sel = PRODS == p\n            gm[p] = np.nanmean(R[sel], axis=0)\n        g = np.vstack([gm[p] for p in PRODS])\n        b = np.nanmean(Q / g, axis=1)\n    M = b[:, None] * g\n    return s_row, M\n\ndef fit_sigma(M, clean_mask, edges):\n    \"\"\"MLE of lognormal sigma per m-bin on clean shopped cells\"\"\"\n    shopped = (A > 0) & clean_mask\n    ms = M[shopped]; ks = A[shopped]\n    ib = np.digitize(ms, edges)\n    sig = np.full(len(edges) + 1, np.nan)\n    grid = np.arange(0.05, 0.45, 0.005)\n    for i in range(len(edges) + 1):\n        sel = ib == i\n        if sel.sum() < 400:\n            continue\n        mloc = ms[sel]; kloc = np.clip(ks[sel], 1, KMAX)\n        best, bsig = -1e18, 0.19\n        for s in grid:\n            hi = norm.logcdf(np.log((kloc + 0.5) / mloc) / s)\n            lo = norm.cdf(np.log(np.maximum(kloc - 0.5, 1e-6) / mloc) / s)\n            ll = np.sum(np.log(np.maximum(np.exp(hi) - lo, 1e-12)))\n            if ll > best:\n                best, bsig = ll, s\n        sig[i] = bsig\n    # fill gaps\n    ok = ~np.isnan(sig)\n    xs = np.arange(len(sig), dtype=float)\n    sig[~ok] = np.interp(xs[~ok], xs[ok], sig[ok])\n    return sig\n\ndef qty_dist(m, sigma):\n    \"\"\"P(qty=k | shop, m) for k=0..KMAX, lognormal-round family. m,sigma arrays broadcast.\"\"\"\n    m = np.asarray(m, dtype=float)\n    cuts = np.arange(KMAX + 1) + 0.5  # 0.5, 1.5, ..., KMAX+0.5\n    z = np.log(cuts[None, :] / np.maximum(m[..., None], 1e-9)) / sigma[..., None]\n    cdf = norm.cdf(z)\n    p = np.concatenate([cdf[..., :1], np.diff(cdf, axis=-1),\n                        1 - cdf[..., -1:]], axis=-1)\n    return np.maximum(p, 0)\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3745,"cache_read_input_tokens":134397,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3745,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":82,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"b5d1b98f-5e5f-48c0-b9e6-a0c4366d3e56","request_id":"req_011CbwQ1NAMMaAwvt6Cvryiz"}

returns s_row, b, g(N,T) M, sigma(m-bins)\"\"\"\n    shopped = (A > 0) & clean_mask\n    Q = np.where(shopped, A.astype(float), np.nan)\n    # per-series shopping rate on clean days\n    s_row = ((A > 0) & clean_mask).sum(axis=1) / np.maximum(clean_mask.sum(axis=1), 1)\n    b = np.nanmean(Q, axis=1)\n    g = np.ones((N, T))\n    for it in range(3):\n        R = Q / b[:, None]\n        gm = {}\n        for p in np.unique(PRODS):\n            sel = PRODS == p\n            gm[p] = np.nanmean(R[sel], axis=0)\n        g = np.vstack([gm[p] for p in PRODS])\n        b = np.nanmean(Q / g, axis=1)\n    M = b[:, None] * g\n    return s_row, M\n\ndef fit_sigma(M, clean_mask, edges):\n    \"\"\"MLE of lognormal sigma per m-bin on clean shopped cells\"\"\"\n    shopped = (A > 0) & clean_mask\n    ms = M[shopped]; ks = A[shopped]\n    ib = np.digitize(ms, edges)\n    sig = np.full(len(edges) + 1, np.nan)\n    grid = np.arange(0.05, 0.45, 0.005)\n    for i in range(len(edges) + 1):\n        sel = ib == i\n        if sel.sum() < 400:\n            continue\n        mloc = ms[sel]; kloc = np.clip(ks[sel], 1, KMAX)\n        best, bsig = -1e18, 0.19\n        for s in grid:\n            hi = norm.logcdf(np.log((kloc + 0.5) / mloc) / s)\n            lo = norm.cdf(np.log(np.maximum(kloc - 0.5, 1e-6) / mloc) / s)\n            ll = np.sum(np.log(np.maximum(np.exp(hi) - lo, 1e-12)))\n            if ll > best:\n                best, bsig = ll, s\n        sig[i] = bsig\n    # fill gaps\n    ok = ~np.isnan(sig)\n    xs = np.arange(len(sig), dtype=float)\n    sig[~ok] = np.interp(xs[~ok], xs[ok], sig[ok])\n    return sig\n\ndef qty_dist(m, sigma):\n    \"\"\"P(qty=k | shop, m) for k=0..KMAX, lognormal-round family. m,sigma arrays broadcast.\"\"\"\n    m = np.asarray(m, dtype=float)\n    cuts = np.arange(KMAX + 1) + 0.5  # 0.5, 1.5, ..., KMAX+0.5\n    z = np.log(cuts[None, :] / np.maximum(m[..., None], 1e-9)) / sigma[..., None]\n    cdf = norm.cdf(z)\n    p = np.concatenate([cdf[..., :1], np.diff(cdf, axis=-1),\n                        1 - cdf[..., -1:]], axis=-1)\n    return np.maximum(p, 0)\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null,"userModified":false}}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_015JHeasJDD6Xae8FYeijDen","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01TFvEGmsY4G9zmj119hGAyw","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 << 'EOF'\nimport numpy as np\nimport em_lib as E\n\n# Round 0: clean = days 1-2 for sigma; but M fit needs full year -> use all days (bias ok for now)\nfull = np.ones_like(E.A, dtype=bool)\ns_row, M = E.fit_model(full)\nclean12 = np.zeros_like(full); clean12[:, :2] = True\nedges = np.arange(1.5, 3.6, 0.2)\nsig = E.fit_sigma(M, clean12, edges)\nprint('sigma by m-bin (days1-2):', np.round(sig, 3))\n# sanity: model vs observed at m=2.53\nimport numpy as np\np = E.qty_dist(np.array([2.53]), np.array([sig[5]]))\nprint('model P(k|2.53):', np.round(p[0][:6], 4))\nnp.save('M0.npy', M); np.save('s0.npy', s_row); np.save('sig0.npy', sig)\nEOF","description":"Fit round-0 model and clean sigma","timeout":300000},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":6970,"cache_read_input_tokens":138142,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":6970,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":62,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"ed06a3aa-02b1-4cf3-9d26-5eedaf767e3f","request_id":"req_011CbwQ9inJwsA5Jfy6QjNGh"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_01KamP8gPscexzYd99aqubpM","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01DcXdcLCDM2txtuuvZctmtx","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/work/detect_lib.py","content":"import numpy as np\nimport em_lib as E\n\nN, T = E.A.shape\nTAUS = (0.2, 0.5, 0.8)\nCLIP = 6.0\nEDGES = np.arange(1.5, 3.6, 0.2)\n\ndef build_null_logp(M, s_row, sig_bins):\n    \"\"\"log P(x | null) per cell for observed panel A, and the qty table per cell\"\"\"\n    IB = np.digitize(M, EDGES)\n    sigma = sig_bins[IB]\n    P0 = E.qty_dist(M, sigma)           # N x T x (K+1) qty dist given shopping\n    return P0\n\ndef delta_arrays(X, M, s_row, P0, rec_emis):\n    \"\"\"clipped per-day log-lik diff for each stage tau.\n    rec_emis: dict tau -> function(M) -> N x T x K probs given shopping\"\"\"\n    s = s_row[:, None]\n    xk = np.clip(X, 0, E.KMAX).astype(int)\n    shopped = X > 0\n    p0x = np.take_along_axis(P0, xk[..., None], axis=2)[..., 0]\n    ln_null_pos = np.log(np.maximum(p0x, 1e-12))           # excludes log s (cancels)\n    null_zero_extra = np.log1p(s / (1 - s) * P0[..., 0])    # log((1-s)+s p0)/ (1-s)\n    out = {}\n    for tau in TAUS:\n        R = rec_emis[tau]\n        rx = np.take_along_axis(R, xk[..., None], axis=2)[..., 0]\n        d_pos = np.log(np.maximum(rx, 1e-12)) - ln_null_pos\n        d_zero = np.log1p(s / (1 - s) * R[..., 0]) - null_zero_extra\n        out[tau] = np.clip(np.where(shopped, d_pos, d_zero), -CLIP, CLIP).astype(np.float32)\n    return out\n\ndef window_scores(deltas, rows, days):\n    C = {tau: np.concatenate([np.zeros((N, 1), np.float32),\n                              np.cumsum(deltas[tau], axis=1)], axis=1) for tau in TAUS}\n    def seg(tau, a, b, r, d):\n        lo = np.minimum(d + a - 1, T); hi = np.minimum(d + b, T)\n        return C[tau][r, hi] - C[tau][r, lo]\n    r, d = rows, days\n    return seg(0.2, 1, 3, r, d) + seg(0.5, 4, 7, r, d) + seg(0.8, 8, 14, r, d)\n\ndef model_rec_emis(M, sig=0.19, mix_zero_stage1=0.5):\n    \"\"\"recovery emissions per tau from lognormal-round family\"\"\"\n    out = {}\n    for tau in TAUS:\n        P = E.qty_dist(M * tau, np.full_like(M, sig))\n        if tau == 0.2 and mix_zero_stage1 > 0:\n            Z = np.zeros_like(P); Z[..., 0] = 0.97; Z[..., 1] = 0.03\n            P = (1 - mix_zero_stage1) * P + mix_zero_stage1 * Z\n        out[tau] = P\n    return out\n\ndef simulate_null(rng, M, s_row, P0):\n    u1 = rng.random((N, T)); u2 = rng.random((N, T))\n    shop = u1 < s_row[:, None]\n    cum = np.cumsum(P0, axis=2)\n    qty = (u2[..., None] > cum).sum(axis=2)\n    return np.where(shop, qty, 0).astype(np.int16)\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":540,"cache_read_input_tokens":145112,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":540,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":62,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"b35730c8-53c3-415c-b877-7e5b155d0dfc","request_id":"req_011CbwQAo1qABRreMwwGvJBt"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01DcXdcLCDM2txtuuvZctmtx","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /app/work/detect_lib.py (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"083ed8da-bbab-4d46-9c1c-d42950ecb874","timestamp":"2026-06-11T11:34:08.697Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/app/work/detect_lib.py","content":"import numpy as np\nimport em_lib as E\n\nN, T = E.A.shape\nTAUS = (0.2, 0.5, 0.8)\nCLIP = 6.0\nEDGES = np.arange(1.5, 3.6, 0.2)\n\ndef build_null_logp(M, s_row, sig_bins):\n    \"\"\"log P(x | null) per cell for observed panel A, and the qty table per cell\"\"\"\n    IB = np.digitize(M, EDGES)\n    sigma = sig_bins[IB]\n    P0 = E.qty_dist(M, sigma)           # N x T x (K+1) qty dist given shopping\n    return P0\n\ndef delta_arrays(X, M, s_row, P0, rec_emis):\n    \"\"\"clipped per-day log-lik diff for each stage tau.\n    rec_emis: dict tau -> function(M) -> N x T x K probs given shopping\"\"\"\n    s = s_row[:, None]\n    xk = np.clip(X, 0, E.KMAX).astype(int)\n    shopped = X > 0\n    p0x = np.take_along_axis(P0, xk[..., None], axis=2)[..., 0]\n    ln_null_pos = np.log(np.maximum(p0x, 1e-12))           # excludes log s (cancels)\n    null_zero_extra = np.log1p(s / (1 - s) * P0[..., 0])    # log((1-s)+s p0)/ (1-s)\n    out = {}\n    for tau in TAUS:\n        R = rec_emis[tau]\n        rx = np.take_along_axis(R, xk[..., None], axis=2)[..., 0]\n        d_pos = np.log(np.maximum(rx, 1e-12)) - ln_null_pos\n        d_zero = np.log1p(s / (1 - s) * R[..., 0]) - null_zero_extra\n        out[tau] = np.clip(np.where(shopped, d_pos, d_zero), -CLIP, CLIP).astype(np.float32)\n    return out\n\ndef window_scores(deltas, rows, days):\n    C = {tau: np.concatenate([np.zeros((N, 1), np.float32),\n                              np.cumsum(deltas[tau], axis=1)], axis=1) for tau in TAUS}\n    def seg(tau, a, b, r, d):\n        lo = np.minimum(d + a - 1, T); hi = np.minimum(d + b, T)\n        return C[tau][r, hi] - C[tau][r, lo]\n    r, d = rows, days\n    return seg(0.2, 1, 3, r, d) + seg(0.5, 4, 7, r, d) + seg(0.8, 8, 14, r, d)\n\ndef model_rec_emis(M, sig=0.19, mix_zero_stage1=0.5):\n    \"\"\"recovery emissions per tau from lognormal-round family\"\"\"\n    out = {}\n    for tau in TAUS:\n        P = E.qty_dist(M * tau, np.full_like(M, sig))\n        if tau == 0.2 and mix_zero_stage1 > 0:\n            Z = np.zeros_like(P); Z[..., 0] = 0.97; Z[..., 1] = 0.03\n            P = (1 - mix_zero_stage1) * P + mix_zero_stage1 * Z\n        out[tau] = P\n    return out\n\ndef simulate_null(rng, M, s_row, P0):\n    u1 = rng.random((N, T)); u2 = rng.random((N, T))\n    shop = u1 < s_row[:, None]\n    cum = np.cumsum(P0, axis=2)\n    qty = (u2[..., None] > cum).sum(axis=2)\n    return np.where(shop, qty, 0).astype(np.int16)\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null,"userModified":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_016RuCRdvuFR7vjNoUJQ34K9","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01RT513ogt1j1Fz3Ebjw55aU","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 << 'EOF'\nimport numpy as np, pickle, collections, pandas as pd\nreal = np.load('real_llr_r1.npy')\nrows = np.load('cand_rows.npy'); days = np.load('cand_days.npy')\nkeys = pd.read_csv('panel_keys.csv').iloc[:,0].values\n\n# cluster detections per series: keep local argmax within 14 days\ndet = np.where(real > 10)[0]\norder = det[np.argsort(rows[det]*1000 + days[det])]\nevents = []\ni = 0\nby_series = collections.defaultdict(list)\nfor j in order: by_series[rows[j]].append(j)\nfor r, js in by_series.items():\n    js = sorted(js, key=lambda j: days[j])\n    cluster = [js[0]]\n    for j in js[1:]:\n        if days[j] - days[cluster[-1]] <= 14: cluster.append(j)\n        else:\n            events.append(max(cluster, key=lambda x: real[x])); cluster=[j]\n    events.append(max(cluster, key=lambda x: real[x]))\nprint('clustered events (LLR>10):', len(events))\n\n# attribute via purchases\npurch = pickle.load(open('purchases.pkl','rb'))\nD = pickle.load(open('deliveries.pkl','rb'))\nbatches = D['batches']\ndf = pd.read_pickle('sales.pkl')\nkey_ix = {k:i for i,k in enumerate(keys)}\ndf['row'] = (df.Store_ID + '|' + df.cons.astype(str) + '|' + df.Product_ID).map(key_ix)\npidx = {}\nfor i,(r,d,s) in enumerate(zip(df.row.values, df.Day.values, df.Sold_Quantity.values)):\n    if s>0: pidx[(r,d)] = df.index[i]\n\npair_events = collections.Counter()\nmulti = 0\nfor j in events:\n    r, d = rows[j], days[j]\n    segs = purch.get(pidx[(r,d)], [])\n    prs = {batches[b][0] for b,_ in segs}\n    p = keys[r].split('|')[2]\n    if len(prs)==1:\n        pair_events[(list(prs)[0], p)] += 1\n    else: multi += 1\nprint('multi-producer triggers:', multi)\ntop = pair_events.most_common(60)\nfor (pr,p),c in top: print(pr, p, c)\nprint('total pairs implicated:', len(pair_events))\ncnt = collections.Counter()\nfor (pr,p),c in pair_events.items(): cnt[pr]+=c\nprint('\\nby producer:', cnt.most_common())\nEOF","description":"Preview producer-product structure of round-1 detections","timeout":120000},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":243,"cache_creation_input_tokens":823,"cache_read_input_tokens":148264,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":823,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":57,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"1946398f-ea58-4421-ba82-3b789e0d076a","request_id":"req_011CbwQGAAT1zbDmbDm9qkLH"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_01P7gCuFrMrYaZ2zJ65HJsWh","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Qz5YtJDmsGEFXC8Rb7UTwq","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"python3 << 'EOF'\nimport numpy as np, collections, pandas as pd\nA = np.load('panel.npy').astype(int)\nM = np.load('M0.npy')\nreal = np.load('real_llr_r1.npy')\nrows = np.load('cand_rows.npy'); days = np.load('cand_days.npy')\n\ndet = np.where(real > 12)[0]\n# cluster per series keep argmax\nby_series = collections.defaultdict(list)\nfor j in det: by_series[rows[j]].append(j)\nevents = []\nfor r, js in by_series.items():\n    js = sorted(js, key=lambda j: days[j])\n    cl = [js[0]]\n    for j in js[1:]:\n        if days[j] - days[cl[-1]] <= 14: cl.append(j)\n        else: events.append(max(cl, key=lambda x: real[x])); cl=[j]\n    events.append(max(cl, key=lambda x: real[x]))\nprint('events LLR>12:', len(events))\n\n# profile: P(x=0/1/2/3 | offset k) for k=1..16 after trigger\nprof = np.zeros((17, 5))\nfor j in events:\n    r, d = rows[j], days[j]\n    for k in range(1, 17):\n        t = d+k-1\n        if t >= 365: break\n        prof[k, min(A[r,t],4)] += 1\ntot = prof.sum(axis=1, keepdims=True); tot[tot==0]=1\nP = prof/tot\nprint('offset | P0 P1 P2 P3 P4+')\nfor k in range(1,17):\n    print(f'{k:>3} | ' + ' '.join(f'{v:.3f}' for v in P[k]))\n\n# joint: among events, demand pattern strings for first 8 days\npats = collections.Counter()\nfor j in events[:400]:\n    r, d = rows[j], days[j]\n    pats[''.join(str(min(A[r,d+k-1],3)) for k in range(1,9) if d+k-1<365)] += 1\nprint('\\ncommon 8-day patterns:', pats.most_common(15))\nEOF","description":"Tabulate empirical stage emission profile from strong events","timeout":120000},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3417,"cache_read_input_tokens":149087,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":3417,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":38,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"69cdf5f0-ec6b-4cc6-982e-1271e78daa14","request_id":"req_011CbwQK5ahrrYgEgv3FhNJD"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_01VJ1STBH1pNeJWvGsU7Mpb7","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01NpHLrNArvBcZupkiX5iiH2","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/work/hmm.py","content":"import numpy as np\nfrom scipy.stats import norm\n\nA = np.load('panel.npy').astype(np.int16)      # demand\nSOLD = np.load('sold_panel.npy')               # sold qty (N,365)\nN, T = A.shape\nPRODS = np.array(open('panel_prod.csv').read().split()[1:])\nKMAX = 8\nNSTATE = 15                                    # 0=normal, 1..14 recovery offsets\nSTAGE = np.array([0] + [1]*3 + [2]*4 + [3]*7)  # state -> emission class\nTAU = {1: 0.2, 2: 0.5, 3: 0.8}\n\nPUR = SOLD > 0\n\ndef fit_M(weights_normal):\n    \"\"\"weighted multiplicative fit of qty|shop using P(normal) weights\"\"\"\n    shopped = A > 0\n    Wn = weights_normal * shopped\n    Q = np.where(shopped, A.astype(float), 0.0)\n    b = (Q * Wn).sum(axis=1) / np.maximum(Wn.sum(axis=1), 1e-9)\n    g = np.ones((N, T))\n    for it in range(3):\n        R = np.where(shopped, Q / np.maximum(b[:, None], 1e-9), 0.0)\n        gm = {}\n        for p in np.unique(PRODS):\n            sel = PRODS == p\n            gm[p] = (R[sel] * Wn[sel]).sum(axis=0) / np.maximum(Wn[sel].sum(axis=0), 1e-9)\n        g = np.vstack([gm[p] for p in PRODS])\n        Qg = np.where(shopped, Q / np.maximum(g, 1e-9), 0.0)\n        b = (Qg * Wn).sum(axis=1) / np.maximum(Wn.sum(axis=1), 1e-9)\n    # shopping rate from normal-day weights\n    s_row = ((A > 0) * weights_normal).sum(axis=1) / np.maximum(weights_normal.sum(axis=1), 1e-9)\n    return b[:, None] * g, np.clip(s_row, 0.05, 0.95)\n\ndef qty_dist(m, sigma):\n    cuts = np.arange(KMAX + 1) + 0.5\n    z = np.log(cuts[None, :] / np.maximum(m[..., None], 1e-9)) / sigma[..., None]\n    cdf = norm.cdf(z)\n    p = np.concatenate([cdf[..., :1], np.diff(cdf, axis=-1), 1 - cdf[..., -1:]], axis=-1)\n    return np.maximum(p, 1e-12)\n\ndef emis_logp(M, s_row, sig_normal, sig_rec, floor=0.003):\n    \"\"\"log emission prob of observed x for classes 0..3 -> (N,T,4)\"\"\"\n    s = s_row[:, None]\n    out = np.empty((N, T, 4), dtype=np.float64)\n    xk = np.clip(A, 0, KMAX).astype(int)[..., None]\n    for c in range(4):\n        meff = M * (1.0 if c == 0 else TAU[c])\n        sg = sig_normal if c == 0 else np.full_like(M, sig_rec)\n        P = qty_dist(meff, sg)\n        P = (1 - floor) * P + floor / (KMAX + 1)\n        px = np.take_along_axis(P, xk, axis=2)[..., 0]\n        p_obs = np.where(A > 0, s * px, (1 - s) + s * P[..., 0])\n        out[..., c] = np.log(np.maximum(p_obs, 1e-300))\n    return out\n\ndef forward_backward(LE, q):\n    \"\"\"LE: (N,T,4) log emissions per class; q: rejection prob per purchase.\n    Returns: loglik total, gamma_rej (N,T) posterior that purchase at day t triggered recovery,\n             post_normal (N,T) posterior of normal state.\"\"\"\n    E = np.exp(LE - LE.max(axis=2, keepdims=True))  # scaled emissions per class\n    # alpha recursion with normalization\n    alpha = np.zeros((N, NSTATE))\n    alpha[:, 0] = 1.0\n    cs = np.zeros((N, T))\n    alphas = np.zeros((N, T, NSTATE))\n    emax = LE.max(axis=2)\n    for t in range(T):\n        # emission update for day t\n        e = E[:, t, :]                       # N x 4\n        obs = e[:, STAGE]                    # N x 15\n        a = alpha * obs\n        c = a.sum(axis=1, keepdims=True)\n        a = a / np.maximum(c, 1e-300)\n        alphas[:, t] = a\n        cs[:, t] = np.maximum(c[:, 0], 1e-300)\n        if t == T - 1: break\n        # transition t -> t+1\n        new = np.zeros_like(a)\n        pur = PUR[:, t].astype(float)        # purchase on day t\n        stay = 1 - q * pur                   # prob of NOT triggering\n        # normal stays normal (unless triggered)\n        new[:, 0] += a[:, 0] * stay\n        # recovery advances\n        new[:, 2:15] += a[:, 1:14] * stay[:, None]\n        new[:, 0] += a[:, 14] * stay         # rec14 -> normal\n        # trigger: any state -> rec1 on purchase\n        new[:, 1] += a.sum(axis=1) * q * pur\n        alpha = new\n    loglik = np.log(cs).sum() + emax.sum()\n\n    # backward\n    beta = np.ones((N, NSTATE))\n    gamma_rej = np.zeros((N, T))\n    post_state = np.zeros((N, T, NSTATE))\n    post_state[:, T-1] = alphas[:, T-1] * beta\n    post_state[:, T-1] /= np.maximum(post_state[:, T-1].sum(axis=1, keepdims=True), 1e-300)\n    for t in range(T - 2, -1, -1):\n        e1 = E[:, t+1, :][:, STAGE]          # emission at t+1 per state\n        bb = beta * e1                       # N x 15\n        pur = PUR[:, t].astype(float)\n        stay = 1 - q * pur\n        nb = np.zeros_like(bb)\n        # reverse of transitions\n        nb[:, 0] += bb[:, 0] * stay          # normal->normal\n        nb[:, 1:14] += bb[:, 2:15] * stay[:, None]\n        nb[:, 14] += bb[:, 0] * stay         # rec14->normal\n        nb += (bb[:, 1] * q * pur)[:, None]  # any -> rec1\n        # xi for trigger: sum_z alpha_t(z) * q*pur * beta_{t+1}(rec1)*e_{t+1}(rec1)\n        gamma_rej[:, t] = alphas[:, t].sum(axis=1) * q * pur * bb[:, 1] / cs[:, t+1]\n        beta = nb / np.maximum(nb.max(axis=1, keepdims=True), 1e-300)\n        # renormalized posterior\n        ps = alphas[:, t] * beta\n        # note: beta normalization makes scale arbitrary; renormalize\n        post_state[:, t] = ps / np.maximum(ps.sum(axis=1, keepdims=True), 1e-300)\n    # gamma_rej scale fix: compute via normalized quantities instead\n    return loglik, gamma_rej, post_state\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":6045,"cache_read_input_tokens":162354,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":6045,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":46,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"67753eb7-5e58-4ae2-91d0-5861385a8659","request_id":"req_011CbwQeUpyae8r4aWGXF7HK"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-fable-5","id":"msg_01QuCbxJSR98arnooKmvQjfH","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01XGfgJoCJgAPa23TRKGmFMD","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/work/hmm.py","content":"import numpy as np\nfrom scipy.stats import norm\n\nA = np.load('panel.npy').astype(np.int16)      # demand (N,365)\nSOLD = np.load('sold_panel.npy')               # sold qty (N,365)\nN, T = A.shape\nPRODS = np.array(open('panel_prod.csv').read().split()[1:])\nKMAX = 8\nNSTATE = 15                                    # 0=normal, 1..14 recovery offsets\nSTAGE = np.array([0] + [1]*3 + [2]*4 + [3]*7)  # state -> emission class\nTAU = [1.0, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8]\nEDGES = np.arange(1.5, 3.55, 0.1)\nNB = len(EDGES) + 1\nPUR = (SOLD > 0)\n\ndef fit_M(weights_normal):\n    shopped = A > 0\n    Wn = weights_normal * shopped\n    Q = np.where(shopped, A.astype(float), 0.0)\n    b = (Q * Wn).sum(axis=1) / np.maximum(Wn.sum(axis=1), 1e-9)\n    g = np.ones((N, T))\n    for it in range(3):\n        R = np.where(shopped, Q / np.maximum(b[:, None], 1e-9), 0.0)\n        gm = {}\n        for p in np.unique(PRODS):\n            sel = PRODS == p\n            gm[p] = (R[sel] * Wn[sel]).sum(axis=0) / np.maximum(Wn[sel].sum(axis=0), 1e-9)\n        g = np.vstack([gm[p] for p in PRODS])\n        Qg = np.where(shopped, Q / np.maximum(g, 1e-9), 0.0)\n        b = (Qg * Wn).sum(axis=1) / np.maximum(Wn.sum(axis=1), 1e-9)\n    s_row = ((A > 0) * weights_normal).sum(axis=1) / np.maximum(weights_normal.sum(axis=1), 1e-9)\n    return b[:, None] * g, np.clip(s_row, 0.05, 0.95)\n\ndef qty_dist_vec(m, sigma):\n    cuts = np.arange(KMAX + 1) + 0.5\n    z = np.log(cuts[None, :] / np.maximum(np.asarray(m, float)[..., None], 1e-9)) / np.asarray(sigma, float)[..., None]\n    cdf = norm.cdf(z)\n    p = np.concatenate([cdf[..., :1], np.diff(cdf, axis=-1), 1 - cdf[..., -1:]], axis=-1)\n    return np.maximum(p, 1e-9)\n\ndef init_tables(sig=0.19):\n    \"\"\"tables[c, b, k]: P(qty=k|shopped, class c, m-bin b), k=0..KMAX\"\"\"\n    centers = np.concatenate([[EDGES[0]-0.05], (EDGES[:-1]+EDGES[1:])/2, [EDGES[-1]+0.05]])\n    tabs = np.zeros((4, NB, KMAX+1))\n    for c in range(4):\n        tabs[c] = qty_dist_vec(centers * TAU[c], np.full(NB, sig))\n    return tabs\n\ndef emis_logE(M, s_row, tabs, floor=0.002):\n    \"\"\"returns scaled emissions E (N,T,4) and log-scale per cell for loglik\"\"\"\n    IB = np.digitize(M, EDGES)\n    s = s_row[:, None]\n    xk = np.clip(A, 0, KMAX).astype(int)\n    logp = np.empty((N, T, 4), dtype=np.float64)\n    for c in range(4):\n        Pc = tabs[c][IB]                     # N,T,K+1\n        Pc = (1 - floor) * Pc + floor / (KMAX + 1)\n        px = np.take_along_axis(Pc, xk[..., None], axis=2)[..., 0]\n        p_obs = np.where(A > 0, s * px, (1 - s) + s * Pc[..., 0])\n        logp[..., c] = np.log(np.maximum(p_obs, 1e-300))\n    mx = logp.max(axis=2)\n    E = np.exp(logp - mx[..., None])\n    return E, mx, IB\n\ndef forward_backward(E, mx, q, collect=None, IB=None, s_row=None, tabs=None, floor=0.002):\n    \"\"\"Scaled FB. Returns loglik, gamma_rej (N,T), Wnormal (N,T float32).\n    If collect='mstep': also accumulate weighted qty histograms H (4,NB,KMAX+1) and zero-attribution.\"\"\"\n    qf = float(q)\n    purf = PUR.astype(np.float64)\n    alphas = np.zeros((N, T, NSTATE), dtype=np.float32)\n    cs = np.zeros((N, T))\n    a = np.zeros((N, NSTATE)); a[:, 0] = 1.0\n    for t in range(T):\n        obs = E[:, t, :][:, STAGE]\n        if t > 0:\n            p = qf * purf[:, t-1]\n            stay = (1 - p)[:, None]\n            new = np.zeros_like(a)\n            new[:, 0] = (a[:, 0] + a[:, 14]) * stay[:, 0]\n            new[:, 2:15] = a[:, 1:14] * stay\n            new[:, 1] = a.sum(axis=1) * p\n            a = new\n        a = a * obs\n        c = a.sum(axis=1)\n        c = np.maximum(c, 1e-300)\n        a = a / c[:, None]\n        alphas[:, t] = a\n        cs[:, t] = c\n    loglik = np.log(cs).sum() + mx.sum()\n\n    gamma_rej = np.zeros((N, T))\n    Wn = np.zeros((N, T), dtype=np.float32)\n    H = np.zeros((4, NB, KMAX + 1)) if collect == 'mstep' else None\n    n_nonshop = 0.0\n    beta = np.ones((N, NSTATE))\n    xk = np.clip(A, 0, KMAX).astype(int)\n    for t in range(T - 1, -1, -1):\n        g = alphas[:, t].astype(np.float64) * beta\n        g = g / np.maximum(g.sum(axis=1, keepdims=True), 1e-300)\n        Wn[:, t] = g[:, 0]\n        if collect == 'mstep':\n            wcls = np.stack([g[:, 0], g[:, 1:4].sum(1), g[:, 4:8].sum(1), g[:, 8:15].sum(1)], axis=1)  # N,4\n            x_t = xk[:, t]\n            sh = A[:, t] > 0\n            # shopped cells: full weight to observed qty\n            for c in range(4):\n                np.add.at(H[c], (IB[sh, t], x_t[sh]), wcls[sh, c])\n            # x==0 cells: attribute fraction s*T0/((1-s)+s*T0) to qty=0\n            if (~sh).any():\n                ibz = IB[~sh, t]\n                sz = s_row[~sh]\n                for c in range(4):\n                    t0 = (1 - floor) * tabs[c][ibz, 0] + floor / (KMAX + 1)\n                    frac = sz * t0 / ((1 - sz) + sz * t0)\n                    np.add.at(H[c], (ibz, np.zeros(len(ibz), int)), wcls[~sh, c] * frac)\n        if t == T - 1:\n            pass\n        if t > 0:\n            # xi for trigger between t-1 -> t\n            ebeta = E[:, t, :][:, STAGE] * beta          # N,15\n            p = qf * purf[:, t-1]\n            gamma_rej[:, t-1] = alphas[:, t-1].sum(axis=1) * p * ebeta[:, 1] / cs[:, t]\n            nb = np.zeros_like(beta)\n            stay = (1 - p)\n            nb[:, 0] = ebeta[:, 0] * stay\n            nb[:, 1:14] = ebeta[:, 2:15] * stay[:, None]\n            nb[:, 14] = ebeta[:, 0] * stay\n            nb += (ebeta[:, 1] * p)[:, None]\n            beta = nb / cs[:, t][:, None]\n            # renormalize beta magnitude to avoid under/overflow (track in cs already)\n        # no else needed\n    return loglik, gamma_rej, Wn, H\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2679,"cache_read_input_tokens":168399,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2679,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":28,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"5cbbd6aa-1710-402d-a107-503834fd0351","uuid":"8cfd5314-92f5-4985-b3f2-341a0c7e3c00","request_id":"req_011CbwQgnmXsFFQaQermmKqy"}

N,4","+            x_t = xk[:, t]","+            sh = A[:, t] > 0","+            # shopped cells: full weight to observed qty","+            for c in range(4):","+                np.add.at(H[c], (IB[sh, t], x_t[sh]), wcls[sh, c])","+            # x==0 cells: attribute fraction s*T0/((1-s)+s*T0) to qty=0","+            if (~sh).any():","+                ibz = IB[~sh, t]","+                sz = s_row[~sh]","+                for c in range(4):","+                    t0 = (1 - floor) * tabs[c][ibz, 0] + floor / (KMAX + 1)","+                    frac = sz * t0 / ((1 - sz) + sz * t0)","+                    np.add.at(H[c], (ibz, np.zeros(len(ibz), int)), wcls[~sh, c] * frac)","+        if t == T - 1:","+            pass","+        if t > 0:","+            # xi for trigger between t-1 -> t","+            ebeta = E[:, t, :][:, STAGE] * beta          # N,15","+            p = qf * purf[:, t-1]","+            gamma_rej[:, t-1] = alphas[:, t-1].sum(axis=1) * p * ebeta[:, 1] / cs[:, t]","+            nb = np.zeros_like(beta)","+            stay = (1 - p)","+            nb[:, 0] = ebeta[:, 0] * stay","+            nb[:, 1:14] = ebeta[:, 2:15] * stay[:, None]","+            nb[:, 14] = ebeta[:, 0] * stay","+            nb += (ebeta[:, 1] * p)[:, None]","+            beta = nb / cs[:, t][:, None]","+            # renormalize beta magnitude to avoid under/overflow (track in cs already)","+        # no else needed","+    return loglik, gamma_rej, Wn, H"]}],"originalFile":"import numpy as np\nfrom scipy.stats import norm\n\nA = np.load('panel.npy').astype(np.int16)      # demand\nSOLD = np.load('sold_panel.npy')               # sold qty (N,365)\nN, T = A.shape\nPRODS = np.array(open('panel_prod.csv').read().split()[1:])\nKMAX = 8\nNSTATE = 15                                    # 0=normal, 1..14 recovery offsets\nSTAGE = np.array([0] + [1]*3 + [2]*4 + [3]*7)  # state -> emission class\nTAU = {1: 0.2, 2: 0.5, 3: 0.8}\n\nPUR = SOLD > 0\n\ndef fit_M(weights_normal):\n    \"\"\"weighted multiplicative fit of qty|shop using P(normal) weights\"\"\"\n    shopped = A > 0\n    Wn = weights_normal * shopped\n    Q = np.where(shopped, A.astype(float), 0.0)\n    b = (Q * Wn).sum(axis=1) / np.maximum(Wn.sum(axis=1), 1e-9)\n    g = np.ones((N, T))\n    for it in range(3):\n        R = np.where(shopped, Q / np.maximum(b[:, None], 1e-9), 0.0)\n        gm = {}\n        for p in np.unique(PRODS):\n            sel = PRODS == p\n            gm[p] = (R[sel] * Wn[sel]).sum(axis=0) / np.maximum(Wn[sel].sum(axis=0), 1e-9)\n        g = np.vstack([gm[p] for p in PRODS])\n        Qg = np.where(shopped, Q / np.maximum(g, 1e-9), 0.0)\n        b = (Qg * Wn).sum(axis=1) / np.maximum(Wn.sum(axis=1), 1e-9)\n    # shopping rate from normal-day weights\n    s_row = ((A > 0) * weights_normal).sum(axis=1) / np.maximum(weights_normal.sum(axis=1), 1e-9)\n    return b[:, None] * g, np.clip(s_row, 0.05, 0.95)\n\ndef qty_dist(m, sigma):\n    cuts = np.arange(KMAX + 1) + 0.5\n    z = np.log(cuts[None, :] / np.maximum(m[..., None], 1e-9)) / sigma[..., None]\n    cdf = norm.cdf(z)\n    p = np.concatenate([cdf[..., :1], np.diff(cdf, axis=-1), 1 - cdf[..., -1:]], axis=-1)\n    return np.maximum(p, 1e-12)\n\ndef emis_logp(M, s_row, sig_normal, sig_rec, floor=0.003):\n    \"\"\"log emission prob of observed x for classes 0..3 -> (N,T,4)\"\"\"\n    s = s_row[:, None]\n    out = np.empty((N, T, 4), dtype=np.float64)\n    xk = np.clip(A, 0, KMAX).astype(int)[..., None]\n    for c in range(4):\n        meff = M * (1.0 if c == 0 else TAU[c])\n        sg = sig_normal if c == 0 else np.full_like(M, sig_rec)\n        P = qty_dist(meff, sg)\n        P = (1 - floor) * P + floor / (KMAX + 1)\n        px = np.take_along_axis(P, xk, axis=2)[..., 0]\n        p_obs = np.where(A > 0, s * px, (1 - s) + s * P[..., 0])\n        out[..., c] = np.log(np.maximum(p_obs, 1e-300))\n    return out\n\ndef forward_backward(LE, q):\n    \"\"\"LE: (N,T,4) log emissions per class; q: rejection prob per purchase.\n    Returns: loglik total, gamma_rej (N,T) posterior that purchase at day t triggered recovery,\n             post_normal (N,T) posterior of normal state.\"\"\"\n    E = np.exp(LE - LE.max(axis=2, keepdims=True))  # scaled emissions per class\n    # alpha recursion with normalization\n    alpha = np.zeros((N, NSTATE))\n    alpha[:, 0] = 1.0\n    cs = np.zeros((N, T))\n    alphas = np.zeros((N, T, NSTATE))\n    emax = LE.max(axis=2)\n    for t in range(T):\n        # emission update for day t\n        e = E[:, t, :]                       # N x 4\n        obs = e[:, STAGE]                    # N x 15\n        a = alpha * obs\n        c = a.sum(axis=1, keepdims=True)\n        a = a / np.maximum(c, 1e-300)\n        alphas[:, t] = a\n        cs[:, t] = np.maximum(c[:, 0], 1e-300)\n        if t == T - 1: break\n        # transition t -> t+1\n        new = np.zeros_like(a)\n        pur = PUR[:, t].astype(float)        # purchase on day t\n        stay = 1 - q * pur                   # prob of NOT triggering\n        # normal stays normal (unless triggered)\n        new[:, 0] += a[:, 0] * stay\n        # recovery advances\n        new[:, 2:15] += a[:, 1:14] * stay[:, None]\n        new[:, 0] += a[:, 14] * stay         # rec14 -> normal\n        # trigger: any state -> rec1 on purchase\n        new[:, 1] += a.sum(axis=1) * q * pur\n        alpha = new\n    loglik = np.log(cs).sum() + emax.sum()\n\n    # backward\n    beta = np.ones((N, NSTATE))\n    gamma_rej = np.zeros((N, T))\n    post_state = np.zeros((N, T, NSTATE))\n    post_state[:, T-1] = alphas[:, T-1] * beta\n    post_state[:, T-1] /= np.maximum(post_state[:, T-1].sum(axis=1, keepdims=True), 1e-300)\n    for t in range(T - 2, -1, -1):\n        e1 = E[:, t+1, :][:, STAGE]          # emission at t+1 per state\n        bb = beta * e1                       # N x 15\n        pur = PUR[:, t].astype(float)\n        stay = 1 - q * pur\n        nb = np.zeros_like(bb)\n        # reverse of transitions\n        nb[:, 0] += bb[:, 0] * stay          # normal->normal\n        nb[:, 1:14] += bb[:, 2:15] * stay[:, None]\n        nb[:, 14] += bb[:, 0] * stay         # rec14->normal\n        nb += (bb[:, 1] * q * pur)[:, None]  # any -> rec1\n        # xi for trigger: sum_z alpha_t(z) * q*pur * beta_{t+1}(rec1)*e_{t+1}(rec1)\n        gamma_rej[:, t] = alphas[:, t].sum(axis=1) * q * pur * bb[:, 1] / cs[:, t+1]\n        beta = nb / np.maximum(nb.max(axis=1, keepdims=True), 1e-300)\n        # renormalized posterior\n        ps = alphas[:, t] * beta\n        # note: beta normalization makes scale arbitrary; renormalize\n        post_state[:, t] = ps / np.maximum(ps.sum(axis=1, keepdims=True), 1e-300)\n    # gamma_rej scale fix: compute via normalized quantities instead\n    return loglik, gamma_rej, post_state\n","userModified":false}}

cdf[..., -1:]], axis=-1)\n    return np.maximum(p, 1e-9)","newString":"    cdf = norm.cdf(z)\n    p = np.concatenate([cdf[..., :1], np.diff(cdf, axis=-1)], axis=-1)\n    p[..., -1] += 1 - cdf[..., -1]\n    return np.maximum(p, 1e-9)","originalFile":"import numpy as np\nfrom scipy.stats import norm\n\nA = np.load('panel.npy').astype(np.int16)      # demand (N,365)\nSOLD = np.load('sold_panel.npy')               # sold qty (N,365)\nN, T = A.shape\nPRODS = np.array(open('panel_prod.csv').read().split()[1:])\nKMAX = 8\nNSTATE = 15                                    # 0=normal, 1..14 recovery offsets\nSTAGE = np.array([0] + [1]*3 + [2]*4 + [3]*7)  # state -> emission class\nTAU = [1.0, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8]\nEDGES = np.arange(1.5, 3.55, 0.1)\nNB = len(EDGES) + 1\nPUR = (SOLD > 0)\n\ndef fit_M(weights_normal):\n    shopped = A > 0\n    Wn = weights_normal * shopped\n    Q = np.where(shopped, A.astype(float), 0.0)\n    b = (Q * Wn).sum(axis=1) / np.maximum(Wn.sum(axis=1), 1e-9)\n    g = np.ones((N, T))\n    for it in range(3):\n        R = np.where(shopped, Q / np.maximum(b[:, None], 1e-9), 0.0)\n        gm = {}\n        for p in np.unique(PRODS):\n            sel = PRODS == p\n            gm[p] = (R[sel] * Wn[sel]).sum(axis=0) / np.maximum(Wn[sel].sum(axis=0), 1e-9)\n        g = np.vstack([gm[p] for p in PRODS])\n        Qg = np.where(shopped, Q / np.maximum(g, 1e-9), 0.0)\n        b = (Qg * Wn).sum(axis=1) / np.maximum(Wn.sum(axis=1), 1e-9)\n    s_row = ((A > 0) * weights_normal).sum(axis=1) / np.maximum(weights_normal.sum(axis=1), 1e-9)\n    return b[:, None] * g, np.clip(s_row, 0.05, 0.95)\n\ndef qty_dist_vec(m, sigma):\n    cuts = np.arange(KMAX + 1) + 0.5\n    z = np.log(cuts[None, :] / np.maximum(np.asarray(m, float)[..., None], 1e-9)) / np.asarray(sigma, float)[..., None]\n    cdf = norm.cdf(z)\n    p = np.concatenate([cdf[..., :1], np.diff(cdf, axis=-1), 1 - cdf[..., -1:]], axis=-1)\n    return np.maximum(p, 1e-9)\n\ndef init_tables(sig=0.19):\n    \"\"\"tables[c, b, k]: P(qty=k|shopped, class c, m-bin b), k=0..KMAX\"\"\"\n    centers = np.concatenate([[EDGES[0]-0.05], (EDGES[:-1]+EDGES[1:])/2, [EDGES[-1]+0.05]])\n    tabs = np.zeros((4, NB, KMAX+1))\n    for c in range(4):\n        tabs[c] = qty_dist_vec(centers * TAU[c], np.full(NB, sig))\n    return tabs\n\ndef emis_logE(M, s_row, tabs, floor=0.002):\n    \"\"\"returns scaled emissions E (N,T,4) and log-scale per cell for loglik\"\"\"\n    IB = np.digitize(M, EDGES)\n    s = s_row[:, None]\n    xk = np.clip(A, 0, KMAX).astype(int)\n    logp = np.empty((N, T, 4), dtype=np.float64)\n    for c in range(4):\n        Pc = tabs[c][IB]                     # N,T,K+1\n        Pc = (1 - floor) * Pc + floor / (KMAX + 1)\n        px = np.take_along_axis(Pc, xk[..., None], axis=2)[..., 0]\n        p_obs = np.where(A > 0, s * px, (1 - s) + s * Pc[..., 0])\n        logp[..., c] = np.log(np.maximum(p_obs, 1e-300))\n    mx = logp.max(axis=2)\n    E = np.exp(logp - mx[..., None])\n    return E, mx, IB\n\ndef forward_backward(E, mx, q, collect=None, IB=None, s_row=None, tabs=None, floor=0.002):\n    \"\"\"Scaled FB. Returns loglik, gamma_rej (N,T), Wnormal (N,T float32).\n    If collect='mstep': also accumulate weighted qty histograms H (4,NB,KMAX+1) and zero-attribution.\"\"\"\n    qf = float(q)\n    purf = PUR.astype(np.float64)\n    alphas = np.zeros((N, T, NSTATE), dtype=np.float32)\n    cs = np.zeros((N, T))\n    a = np.zeros((N, NSTATE)); a[:, 0] = 1.0\n    for t in range(T):\n        obs = E[:, t, :][:, STAGE]\n        if t > 0:\n            p = qf * purf[:, t-1]\n            stay = (1 - p)[:, None]\n            new = np.zeros_like(a)\n            new[:, 0] = (a[:, 0] + a[:, 14]) * stay[:, 0]\n            new[:, 2:15] = a[:, 1:14] * stay\n            new[:, 1] = a.sum(axis=1) * p\n            a = new\n        a = a * obs\n        c = a.sum(axis=1)\n        c = np.maximum(c, 1e-300)\n        a = a / c[:, None]\n        alphas[:, t] = a\n        cs[:, t] = c\n    loglik = np.log(cs).sum() + mx.sum()\n\n    gamma_rej = np.zeros((N, T))\n    Wn = np.zeros((N, T), dtype=np.float32)\n    H = np.zeros((4, NB, KMAX + 1)) if collect == 'mstep' else None\n    n_nonshop = 0.0\n    beta = np.ones((N, NSTATE))\n    xk = np.clip(A, 0, KMAX).astype(int)\n    for t in range(T - 1, -1, -1):\n        g = alphas[:, t].astype(np.float64) * beta\n        g = g / np.maximum(g.sum(axis=1, keepdims=True), 1e-300)\n        Wn[:, t] = g[:, 0]\n        if collect == 'mstep':\n            wcls = np.stack([g[:, 0], g[:, 1:4].sum(1), g[:, 4:8].sum(1), g[:, 8:15].sum(1)], axis=1)  # N,4\n            x_t = xk[:, t]\n            sh = A[:, t] > 0\n            # shopped cells: full weight to observed qty\n            for c in range(4):\n                np.add.at(H[c], (IB[sh, t], x_t[sh]), wcls[sh, c])\n            # x==0 cells: attribute fraction s*T0/((1-s)+s*T0) to qty=0\n            if (~sh).any():\n                ibz = IB[~sh, t]\n                sz = s_row[~sh]\n                for c in range(4):\n                    t0 = (1 - floor) * tabs[c][ibz, 0] + floor / (KMAX + 1)\n                    frac = sz * t0 / ((1 - sz) + sz * t0)\n                    np.add.at(H[c], (ibz, np.zeros(len(ibz), int)), wcls[~sh, c] * frac)\n        if t == T - 1:\n            pass\n        if t > 0:\n            # xi for trigger between t-1 -> t\n            ebeta = E[:, t, :][:, STAGE] * beta          # N,15\n            p = qf * purf[:, t-1]\n            gamma_rej[:, t-1] = alphas[:, t-1].sum(axis=1) * p * ebeta[:, 1] / cs[:, t]\n            nb = np.zeros_like(beta)\n            stay = (1 - p)\n            nb[:, 0] = ebeta[:, 0] * stay\n            nb[:, 1:14] = ebeta[:, 2:15] * stay[:, None]\n            nb[:, 14] = ebeta[:, 0] * stay\n            nb += (ebeta[:, 1] * p)[:, None]\n            beta = nb / cs[:, t][:, None]\n            # renormalize beta magnitude to avoid under/overflow (track in cs already)\n        # no else needed\n    return loglik, gamma_rej, Wn, H\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":35,"oldLines":7,"newStart":35,"newLines":8,"lines":["     cuts = np.arange(KMAX + 1) + 0.5","     z = np.log(cuts[None, :] / np.maximum(np.asarray(m, float)[..., None], 1e-9)) / np.asarray(sigma, float)[..., None]","     cdf = norm.cdf(z)","-    p = np.concatenate([cdf[..., :1], np.diff(cdf, axis=-1), 1 - cdf[..., -1:]], axis=-1)","+    p = np.concatenate([cdf[..., :1], np.diff(cdf, axis=-1)], axis=-1)","+    p[..., -1] += 1 - cdf[..., -1]","     return np.maximum(p, 1e-9)"," "," def init_tables(sig=0.19):"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}
